articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A high pressure system of caste hatred dominated the board, bringing with it a torrent of violent rhetoric against low castes. The opener called for brutal actions, including killing, beheading, and mutilating low castes, drawing a large number of responses.

A scattered drizzle of livestream-death gossip occurred in the afternoon, as Anon discussed the death of a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic model who died during a livestream in Italy.

A cold snap of incel anxiety also moved in, as one anon sought advice on transforming from incel to 'Chad' in just two months.

Elsewhere, a front of religious insults blew in, with Anon calling Buddhists 'dumb' and atheist, while another thread saw Anon discussing the implications of Pakistan's existence on Indian patriotism.

articles.title: Anon Calls for Violence Against Low Castes, Others Respond
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread with a post calling for violence against low castes, including beheading, acid attacks, and other forms of brutal harm. The original poster listed several violent actions, including killing, beheading, and using low castes as manure.

Another anon responded by blaming low castes for India's poverty and negative international perceptions. This respondent claimed that low castes have ruined prestigious Indian institutions.

A third anon suggested allowing low castes to use upper caste surnames, then joked about low castes committing crimes and blaming upper castes. This poster described a grim scenario where low castes commit crimes and shift the blame.

One respondent brought up a specific case of a dalit man accused of raping a five-year-old, noting that the man's supporters abandoned him once he was caught. This poster highlighted the alleged disconnect between dalit identity and criminal behavior.

Another poster disputed the idea of high and low castes, instead grouping people by OBC and SC/ST categories. This respondent described individuals using reservations as "dysgenic" and associated them with "total death.

articles.title: Erotic Model's Livestream Ends in Death
articles.body:
Anon described a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic gay model who was livestreaming from Italy during the COVID-19 pandemic. The model was talking about the latest news while a radio station played in the background.

Another anon provided a case from a German Forensic Medicine textbook, where a 24-year-old man intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner in 2004.

Anon also shared a case of a 23-year-old woman who was doing it with her male partner as a spotter, but he had waited too long, leaving her hanging for a minute while he masturbated.

A different anon mentioned an 18-year-old young man streaming on an erotic platform, where a viewer requested that he masturbate while hanging himself in exchange for a donation.

There was debate among responders about the intentions of a model who died during a livestream. Some wondered if it was a suicide, meant to make his death stand out, or an accidental death.

Anon discussed how some people get aroused by strange things, such as imagining being killed by hanging or strangulation.

Another anon shared a personal experience of watching gore videos since age 13, but found hanging videos to be particularly uncomfortable.

articles.title: Incel to Chad Transformation Advice
articles.body:
Anon asked how to achieve an 'Incel to Chad transformation in 2 months.' One respondent suggested taking practical steps such as going to the gym, eating protein, sleeping, growing a beard, getting a haircut, and stopping habits like excessive masturbation and complaining.

Another anon advised the original poster to stop using labels like 'randi' and instead think of promiscuous women as simply that, as it could enhance his chances of meeting one.

A different approach was proposed when an anon shared his personal experience of having sex with his girlfriend for the first time at the ages of 25 and 26, and expressed concerns about not wanting to make her pregnant.

One harsh response simply told the original poster to 'get fucked, incel' and 'just do it.' The discussion also touched on topics like underwear preferences, with one poster explaining the difference between thongs and G-strings.

A separate conversation arose around the use of abusive language, with one poster advising against using cheap Hindi abuses, especially in front of women.

The thread also included personal attacks, with one poster calling another a 'fagyush' and 'faggot.'

articles.title: Anon Calls Buddhists 'Dumb', Atheist
articles.body: Anon questioned the intelligence of Buddhists, calling them 'dumb' and 'atheist'. The original poster claimed Buddhism made 90% of North Indians 'vegan and subhuman'. Another anon countered that Buddhism emerged from a single person, turned the subcontinent vegan, and was later co-opted by non-Indians. A respondent noted that actual Buddhist scholars do not recognize Ambedkarite Buddhism as legitimate, viewing it as a political ideology with Buddhist flavor.

articles.title: Indians on Pakistan's Existence
articles.body:
Anon posted that if Pakistan vanishes, Indian patriotic zeal will plummet. One respondent disagreed, saying Indians do not obsess over Pakistan and have better things to think about.

Another anon noted that coexistence with Islam is not possible and that Pakistan's existence is tied to its Islamic identity.

A different poster brought up caste, stating low castes should be kept away from the army and bureaucracy, and that India needs anti-reservation policies.
